items.summary: Added a canonical JSON extraction module with object, array, fenced-block, embedded-payload, malformed-payload, empty-text, and multi-brace behavior. Existing wrapper imports remain compatible.
Refactored fixed-window boundary selection into explicit paragraph, sentence, whitespace, and hard-cut helpers while preserving progress and short-page behavior.
items.metric_impact: none unless chunking reports are explicitly regenerated

items.summary: No-answer labels with source_page=-1 remain excluded from page fallback matching.
Exact evidence containment remains the acceptance policy. Existing near-miss diagnostics are retained, and fuzzy or normalized matches remain diagnostic-only rather than accepted provenance.
Leading short proposition-like fragments are already forward-merged and covered by chunking tests.
Centralized source delimiter and unknown-source handling. Existing public source strings are preserved, duplicate labels are normalized, and merged strings are parsed consistently.
Runtime availability now uses the central configured_llm_provider helper and preserves provider-specific key checks.
Typed ontology exception work is deferred because partial TTL/manifest preservation already addresses the data-loss risk. CLI behavior is unchanged.
Documented _score behavior and added direct tests for numeric, numeric-string, missing, None, and non-numeric scores.
The fallback question/gold-label loader reuses preloaded labels instead of reading the same gold-label file again.

focused_tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_json_extraction.py tests/test_json_utils.py tests/test_kg_extraction.py::test_extract_json_payload_variants tests/test_llm_review_reports.py::test_llm_runtime_available_uses_central_environment_loader tests/test_llm_review_reports.py::test_llm_runtime_available_rejects_unsupported_provider tests/test_llm_review_reports.py::test_llm_runtime_available_accepts_vllm_without_api_key tests/test_chunking.py tests/test_experiment_protocol.py::test_load_questions_and_gold_labels_reuses_preloaded_gold_for_cq_fallback tests/test_hybrid_retrieval.py::test_reciprocal_rank_fusion_normalizes_merged_source_labels tests/test_hybrid_retrieval.py::test_score_defaults_invalid_values_to_zero

claim_impact.dashboard_final_report_update: source inventory/status only; no strengthened claim
